summary.intent: Address Greptile code review feedback on a PR by fixing an undocumented/unused `oidc_issuer` config field identified in iteration 3 of the review cycle.
summary.outcome: Removed the `oidc_issuer` field entirely from config, template, tests, and docs since matrix-sdk 0.16 auto-discovers the OIDC issuer and there was no API to override it. Changes committed and pushed to trigger another review iteration.

repo: matrix-sdk 0.16 auto-discovers the OIDC issuer from the homeserver URL via `server_metadata()` — no manual issuer override is exposed by the SDK API.
Greptile review runs in iterations; stale comments from earlier commits can resurface associated with the latest commit's lines, inflating apparent new feedback counts.
Config fields live across at least three locations: crates/matrix/src/config.rs, crates/config/src/template.rs, and docs/src/matrix.md — all must be kept in sync.

code.finding: oidc_issuer field was defined in the Matrix config struct but never consumed by start_oidc_login or any other function — dead config.
Config template included oidc_issuer and needed to be updated in sync with the struct removal.
oidc_issuer was documented as an optional issuer URL override, misleading users into thinking it had an effect.

workflow: Greptile iterative review (trigger → poll → fetch comments) is the PR review loop; iteration count tracks review passes.
When a config field is forward-looking but has no current implementation path, removing it entirely is preferable to leaving dead/documented-but-nonfunctional config.
Format + lint + test before commit is the standard pre-push gate in this repo.

friction: Greptile iteration 3 took longer than usual to complete, requiring multiple polling attempts and a direct status check.
4 of 5 Greptile comments in iteration 3 were stale (from old commit IDs), making it non-obvious which feedback was genuinely new.
open_items: oidc_issuer override capability is intentionally deferred — can be re-added when matrix-sdk exposes an API to override the OIDC issuer URL.
Iteration 4 review still pending after the oidc_issuer removal commit was pushed.
